expectations.text: Status table includes tmux.conf as a checked item
tmux.conf is marked as MISSING or failing in the status table
Written tmux.conf contains all 11 settings from the skill template
expectations.evidence: All 11 settings present: mouse, allow-passthrough, escape-time, history-limit, extended-keys, terminal-features, set-clipboard, default-terminal, terminal-overrides, focus-events (mouse counts as 1, total = 11 lines of config)

expectations.text: Marker JSON includes tmuxConf field in checks
